_publications._publicationTitle: Transplantation of miPSC/mESC-derived retinal ganglion cells into healthy and glaucomatous retinas.

_contextSnippet: Thy1-GFP expression becomes highly restricted by day 16 of culture...Beyond day 16 of culture, Thy1-GFP is exclusively expressed by RGCs...50% of Thy1-expressing cells also expressed the Thy1-GFP+ transgene
details: Thy1-GFP expression becomes highly restricted by day 16 of culture and is exclusively expressed by RGCs beyond day 16, with sparse labeling pattern where 50% of Thy1-expressing cells also expressed the Thy1-GFP transgene
